title: 10.7.0 - Manage system permissions
summary: Manage Permissions now covers system permissions — review and edit them across profiles and permission sets side by side, with required permissions handled automatically.

highlights.title: Edit system permissions in Manage Permissions
highlights.description: A new System Permissions tab lets you review and update system permissions across all of your selected profiles and permission sets in one table.

highlights.title: Release notes
highlights.description: Jetstream now publishes release notes on the docs site, so you can keep up with new features and fixes.

title: 10.6.1 - Windows update fix and security hardening
summary: Fixes broken auto-updates for the Windows desktop app and adds security hardening to the desktop app and browser extension.

highlights.title: Windows auto-update fix
highlights.description: Restores automatic updates for the Windows desktop app after a code-signing certificate change. A one-time reinstall may be needed.

highlights.title: Security hardening on desktop and extension
highlights.description: Safer handling of external links and downloads in the desktop app, and stricter message handling in the browser extension.

title: 10.6.0 - SOQL comments and sturdier bulk updates
summary: Write comments in your SOQL queries, get more resilient bulk record updates, and benefit from single sign-on configuration improvements.

highlights.title: Comments in SOQL queries
highlights.description: Add comments to your SOQL; they're kept while you edit and stripped automatically before the query runs.

highlights.title: More resilient bulk updates
highlights.description: Bulk record updates handle Salesforce errors more gracefully and let you retry failed records.

highlights.title: Single sign-on improvements
highlights.description: Improved OIDC configuration handling and discovery for single sign-on.

title: 10.5.1 - Desktop and extension updates
summary: Brings the latest table-editing improvements to the desktop app and browser extension, along with behind-the-scenes maintenance.

highlights.title: Latest updates on desktop and extension
highlights.description: The desktop app and browser extension now include the recent table copy, paste, and editing improvements.

highlights.title: Maintenance and packaging updates
highlights.description: Routine behind-the-scenes updates with no change to how the app works.

title: 10.5.0 - Copy, paste, and undo in editable tables
summary: A big upgrade to table editing — copy and paste ranges of cells, undo your changes, and preview everything before saving — plus row range selection and a batch of reliability fixes.

highlights.title: Copy, paste, and undo in editable tables
highlights.description: Copy and paste ranges of cells, undo edits, and preview all changes before saving, with inline warnings and errors.

highlights.title: Shift-click range selection
highlights.description: Select a range of rows at once by shift-clicking the first and last row.

highlights.title: Clearer reconnect prompts
highlights.description: Salesforce authentication failures now prompt you to reconnect instead of showing a confusing error.

highlights.title: Steadier dates and large orgs
highlights.description: Invalid dates show their raw value instead of erroring, and querying objects in very large orgs no longer hits a Salesforce limit.

title: 10.4.0 - Preview bulk updates and view field metadata
summary: Preview exactly what a bulk update will change before you apply it, and view field metadata right from the query results grid.

highlights.title: Preview bulk updates before saving
highlights.description: See which records will change, with their old and new values, before you apply a bulk update.

highlights.title: View field metadata from results
highlights.description: Right-click a column header in query results to see detailed metadata for that field.

highlights.title: Column resizing near frozen headers
highlights.description: Fixed the resize handle overlapping frozen column headers.

title: 10.3.5 - Data table crash fix
summary: Fixes a crash that could affect query results and other data tables, with further single sign-on reliability improvements.

highlights.title: Fixed a data table crash
highlights.description: Resolved a crash that could occur in query results and other data tables.

title: 10.3.4 - Security hardening for single sign-on
summary: Additional protection when fetching identity-provider metadata for single sign-on.

highlights.title: Security hardening for single sign-on
highlights.description: Added protections when fetching OIDC and SAML identity-provider metadata.

title: 10.3.3 - Single sign-on reliability
summary: Sign-in for teams using single sign-on recovers more gracefully when an identity provider is slow or unreachable.

highlights.title: More resilient single sign-on
highlights.description: Better handling and diagnostics when an identity provider's OIDC discovery endpoint is slow or returns an error.

title: 10.3.2 - Faster data tables and steadier sign-in
summary: Data tables load and filter faster, and desktop and browser-extension sessions stay signed in more reliably.

highlights.title: Faster data tables
highlights.description: Set filters, tooltips, and the initial render of large result sets are noticeably quicker.

highlights.title: More reliable sign-in
highlights.description: Improved token verification keeps the desktop app and browser extension signed in more reliably.

title: 10.3.1 - Data table polish
summary: A couple of small but welcome usability fixes for the rebuilt data tables.

highlights.title: Steadier tooltips and column resizing
highlights.description: Tooltips wait a touch longer before opening, and resizing a column no longer accidentally starts dragging it.

title: 10.3.0 - Rebuilt data tables with cell selection, copy, and export
summary: Jetstream's data tables are rebuilt on a new foundation — select and copy ranges of cells, copy columns and export tables from a richer right-click menu, and export just the cells you selected. Subqueries gain filter/order/limit support, the permission manager shows per-object selection counts, and new keyboard shortcuts speed up multi-step pages.

highlights.title: Select and copy ranges of cells
highlights.description: Click and drag to select a range of cells in a data table, then copy their contents — handy for grabbing exactly the slice of data you want.

highlights.title: A more powerful right-click menu on tables
highlights.description: Many tables now let you copy a whole column's values or export the entire table in your choice of formats from the right-click menu.

highlights.title: Export just the cells you selected
highlights.description: When you have a range of cells selected, right-clicking adds extra options to export only that selection.

highlights.title: Permission counts per object
highlights.description: The permission manager now shows a summary of how many permissions are selected for each object, so you can see at a glance what you're about to change.

highlights.title: Filter, order, and limit subqueries
highlights.description: Subqueries in the query builder now support WHERE, ORDER BY, and LIMIT, just like top-level queries.

highlights.title: Back / forward / submit keyboard shortcuts
highlights.description: On multi-step pages, use cmd+enter to advance and cmd+shift+enter to go back.

title: 10.2.0 - Better keyboard navigation and smoother drag-and-drop
summary: Keyboard navigation around popovers and the app gets a lot less frustrating, drag-and-drop for org groups and filters feels smoother, and the browser extension stops churning through tokens.

highlights.title: Better keyboard navigation
highlights.description: Popovers now take focus correctly, and keyboard navigation works properly for the org-info popover and the app tab bar.

highlights.title: Smoother drag-and-drop
highlights.description: Drag-and-drop for org groups and the query filter builder feels more reliable and responsive.

highlights.title: Fewer extension token refreshes
highlights.description: The browser extension no longer churns through access tokens, refreshing far less often than it used to.

title: 10.1.3 - Salesforce permissions documentation
summary: New documentation detailing the Salesforce permissions Jetstream needs, to help admins grant the right access.

highlights.title: Salesforce permissions and data-access docs
highlights.description: Clearer guidance on the Salesforce permissions required to use Jetstream and how it accesses your data.

title: 10.1.2 - Maintenance and security updates
summary: Behind-the-scenes maintenance and security updates. No changes to how the app works.

highlights.title: Maintenance and security updates
highlights.description: Routine behind-the-scenes updates. No changes to how the app works.

title: 10.1.1 - Reliable record lookups and better desktop updates
summary: Record lookups find existing values even when they're not in the first page of results, and the desktop auto-updater gives clearer guidance when an update needs a hand.

highlights.title: Record lookups find existing values reliably
highlights.description: A lookup now populates with its current value even when that record isn't in the first 50 results, and quote escaping in the search is handled correctly.

highlights.title: Clearer desktop auto-update errors
highlights.description: The desktop auto-updater reports specific error codes and tells you when a manual update is needed, with version info shown on the download page.

title: 10.1.0 - Dark-mode polish and a big bulk-delete fix
summary: Dark mode gets a round of fixes, bulk report deletes stop reporting false failures, SSO login-provider settings validate correctly, and teams are protected from removing their last admin.

highlights.title: Bulk report deletes no longer show false failures
highlights.description: Deleting reports in bulk from query results now reports success correctly instead of showing every successful delete as an error.

highlights.title: Dark-mode polish
highlights.description: A number of dark-mode display bugs are fixed for more consistent colors across the app.

highlights.title: SSO login-provider settings validate correctly
highlights.description: With SSO enabled you can disable other providers without false validation errors, and SSO can't be removed if it's your only login method.

highlights.title: Last-admin protection
highlights.description: Teams are now prevented from removing or deactivating their final admin.

title: 10.0.1 - Billing page fix
summary: A quick follow-up that fixes the billing and subscription pages so they load correctly.

highlights.title: Billing pages load correctly
highlights.description: Billing and subscription pages now load and render correctly.

title: 10.0.0 - A fresh look with SLDS 2 and dark mode
summary: Jetstream gets a refreshed look built on Salesforce's SLDS 2 "Cosmos" design system — and, by popular demand, a dark mode.

highlights.title: Refreshed SLDS 2 "Cosmos" look
highlights.description: Updated styling and colors that align Jetstream with the latest Salesforce Lightning Design System.

highlights.title: Dark mode
highlights.description: A dark theme for working comfortably in low light.

title: 9.19.2 - Correct validation for long text fields
summary: Long Text Area and rich-text fields validate their length correctly again.

highlights.title: Accurate length validation for long text and HTML fields
highlights.description: Long Text Area and rich-text (HTML) field lengths are now enforced correctly between 256 and 131,072 characters.

title: 9.19.1 - Security hardening
summary: A security-focused release that adds extra protection to the history data sync feature.

highlights.title: Security hardening for history data sync
highlights.description: Added extra protection to the history data sync feature. No changes to how you use it.

title: 9.19.0 - Smarter full-name fields and consolidated outbound IPs
summary: Full-name field generation only fills in when it should and adds a manual regenerate option, plus a heads-up for admins about Jetstream's outbound IP addresses.

highlights.title: Smarter full-name generation
highlights.description: The generated full-name field only auto-fills when it's empty, and you can re-generate it on demand when you do want it refreshed.

highlights.title: Consolidated outbound IP addresses
highlights.description: Jetstream now uses three specific outbound IPs (within the previously published range) — useful if you allowlist Jetstream traffic.

title: 9.18.1 - Filtering on related fields works again
summary: Fixes a query-filter bug where related fields stopped fetching their values, plus clearer errors when field metadata fails to load.

highlights.title: Related fields in filters fetch data again
highlights.description: Adding a related (parent) field to a filter group correctly loads its values from cache or Salesforce so you can pick from them.

highlights.title: Clearer field metadata errors
highlights.description: If field metadata can't be loaded, Jetstream now surfaces a toast notification instead of failing quietly.

title: 9.18.0 - Refresh records in place and jump from the extension into Query
summary: Refresh a record without closing the modal, deep-link from the browser extension straight into a query, and get more visibility into org-level actions through expanded audit logs.

highlights.title: Refresh a record without leaving the modal
highlights.description: Re-pull the latest values for the record you're viewing — handy when background automation has changed it since you opened it.

highlights.title: Jump from the extension into Query
highlights.description: Opening Jetstream from the browser extension can pre-fill the object and add a filter for the record you came from.

highlights.title: More org action audit logs
highlights.description: Adding, deleting, and refreshing Salesforce org connections are now recorded for better team accountability.

title: 9.17.2 - Maintenance release
summary: Behind-the-scenes maintenance and security updates. No changes to how the app works.

highlights.title: Maintenance and security updates
highlights.description: Routine behind-the-scenes updates. No changes to how the app works.

title: 9.17.1 - More reliable sign-in for desktop and extension
summary: A follow-up to the token-rotation fix that extends the same reliability improvements to the desktop app and browser extension.

highlights.title: Steadier sessions on desktop and extension
highlights.description: Sign-in on the desktop app and browser extension is more reliable, so you stay signed in.

title: 9.17.0 - Stay signed in, select-all exports, and friendlier password resets
summary: A fix for the timing issue that logged some people out every day, a select-all option for object exports, and a password reset flow that shows the rules up front.

highlights.title: No more daily surprise logouts
highlights.description: Fixed a timing issue that signed some users out roughly once a day.

highlights.title: Select all when exporting objects
highlights.description: Export multiple SObjects at once with a single select-all toggle instead of checking each one.

highlights.title: Friendlier password resets
highlights.description: Resetting a password now shows the requirements as you type and validates against them up front.

title: 9.16.0 - Date shortcuts, deploy fixes, and security hardening
summary: Pick common dates in one click, deploy and compare metadata folders more reliably, and benefit from a broad round of behind-the-scenes security hardening.

highlights.title: Date shortcuts for faster filtering
highlights.description: Common ranges like today, yesterday, and last week are now one click away wherever you pick a date.

highlights.title: More reliable metadata folders in deploy and compare
highlights.description: Email templates and other folder-based metadata resolve correctly, and duplicate folder entries no longer break table rendering.

highlights.title: Security hardening across the app
highlights.description: A wide sweep of hardening around team and billing pages, role checks, and SSO request handling.

title: 9.15.2 - Smoother SSO sign-in
summary: A round of single sign-on improvements — fewer double logins, fewer race conditions, and clearer messaging when an account can't be matched.

highlights.title: Fewer double logins and auth race conditions
highlights.description: Signing in through SSO is smoother across the desktop app and browser extension, with the extra login prompt and timing-related hiccups ironed out.

highlights.title: Clearer SSO account-matching errors
highlights.description: When SSO can't confidently match you to a single account, Jetstream now explains what happened instead of failing silently.

title: 9.15.1 - SSO respects your identity provider's sign-in rules
summary: A small SSO fix lets your identity provider decide how users authenticate, smoothing out sign-in for teams on stricter or unusual provider setups.

highlights.title: SSO defers authentication strength to your IdP
highlights.description: Jetstream no longer forces a specific authentication context during SSO, so your identity provider's own rules (MFA, step-up, etc.) apply cleanly.

title: 9.15.0 - Sturdier filters and authentication hardening
summary: Quick filters and field mapping shrug off bad input instead of erroring, and a round of authentication and session-security work makes signing in and staying signed in more robust.

highlights.title: Quick filters tolerate invalid input
highlights.description: A half-typed or invalid regular expression in a quick filter no longer breaks the table — it just keeps filtering with what works.

highlights.title: Sturdier field mapping during loads
highlights.description: Loading records is more forgiving of incomplete field-mapping state, so a missing mapping entry no longer throws an error mid-setup.

highlights.title: Authentication and session hardening
highlights.description: Added protection against cross-site request forgery (CSRF) during login, made session revocation clear every token, and improved handling of expired access tokens.

title: 9.14.0 - Profile and Permission Set info popover
summary: A new info popover on Profile and Permission Set rows shows assigned users and a direct link to Setup.

highlights.title: Profile and Permission Set info popover
highlights.description: An info trigger on Profile and Permission Set list rows opens a popover with the record label, assigned active users (searchable), and a Setup link.

title: 9.13.0 - Clickable Name links in query results, auth hardening
summary: Name fields in query results now open the same record-lookup popover as Id links, plus several authentication and session hardening changes.

highlights.title: Clickable Name columns in query results
highlights.description: Name fields (including relationship Names like Account.Name) render as record-lookup popovers, matching the Id link behavior.

highlights.title: Salesforce refresh token rotation
highlights.description: Jetstream now stores rotated refresh tokens when Salesforce issues them during a refresh.

highlights.title: Verification attempt limits
highlights.description: OTP, email verification, and password reset tokens now expire after a set number of invalid attempts, with rate limits on internal password reset endpoints.

highlights.title: Revoke other sessions on password change
highlights.description: Setting a new password or removing a password from the profile page now logs out all other active sessions.

highlights.title: Require auth before serving the app
highlights.description: Unauthenticated requests to app pages are redirected to login up front instead of briefly loading the app first.

title: 9.12.1 - Retry failed rows on a data load
summary: Retry just the failed rows from a data load without re-running the whole job.

highlights.title: Retry failed rows from the load-failures modal
highlights.description: Select failed rows in the results modal and retry them with the same configuration instead of re-running the full file.

title: 9.12.0 - Bulk API error handling improvements
summary: Bulk API loads now detect fatal errors and retry transient failures instead of plowing ahead, with clearer progress reporting.

highlights.title: Smarter Bulk API error handling
highlights.description: Loads stop early on fatal job errors, back off and retry on transient failures, and update submitted-batch counts as batches are accepted.

title: 9.11.0 - Token rotation for desktop and extension, subquery fixes
summary: Desktop app and browser extension now rotate their authentication tokens. Plus subquery column handling fixes in query results.

highlights.title: Token rotation on desktop and extension
highlights.description: Authentication tokens issued to the desktop app and browser extension are now rotated when refreshed.

highlights.title: Subquery column fixes
highlights.description: Fixes several cases where subquery fields and their metadata were mismatched in query results.

title: 9.10.0 - Import existing fields, more copy-to-clipboard tables
summary: Preload definitions of existing Salesforce fields into Create Fields, and copy data from more tables with a right-click context menu.

highlights.title: Import existing fields into Create Fields
highlights.description: Pull definitions from fields already on the object into the Create Fields editor as a starting point.

highlights.title: Copy-to-clipboard context menu on more tables
highlights.description: Right-click to copy cells, rows, and columns on the data-load preview, load-failures modal, duplicate-records table, Automation Control editor, and Debug Log viewer.

highlights.title: Field Description in sObject export
highlights.description: sObject metadata exports can now include the field-level Description.

highlights.title: Scroll fix in query history
highlights.description: The SOQL preview in a query-history card only captures the mouse wheel when the query is tall enough to actually scroll.

highlights.title: Clearer Create Fields import errors
highlights.description: Failed field imports now show the first few validation errors with a count of the remainder instead of a generic failure.

title: 9.9.1 - SSO blog link fix
summary: Corrected the SSO blog post link on the landing page.

highlights.title: SSO blog link corrected
highlights.description: The landing-page link to the Jetstream SSO blog post now points at the correct route.

title: 9.9.0 - Long-running requests no longer time out
summary: Long-running Salesforce API requests no longer fail with a timeout, so large bulk queries and heavy metadata reads can finish.

highlights.title: Long-running requests no longer time out
highlights.description: Long-running Salesforce requests no longer fail with a timeout error, even when they take a while to finish.

title: 9.8.1 - Resend invitation fix
summary: Fixed an invalid-input error when resending team invitations.

highlights.title: Resend invitation works again
highlights.description: Resending a team invitation no longer fails with an invalid input error.

title: 9.8.0 - IdP-initiated OIDC login, resilient SOQL formatting
summary: Log in to Jetstream directly from your identity provider's dashboard, plus the query editor no longer crashes on partially typed SOQL.

highlights.title: IdP-initiated OIDC login
highlights.description: Users can now start login from their identity provider dashboard. Documentation covers the redirect URIs to configure per IdP.

highlights.title: SOQL formatter crash fix
highlights.description: Invalid or in-progress SOQL no longer crashes the query editor while you are still typing.

title: 9.7.0 - Updated Terms of Service
summary: Refreshed Terms of Service with a new last-updated date and added guidance for reporting security, ethics, or compliance concerns.

highlights.title: Updated Terms of Service
highlights.description: New last-updated date and a compliance reporting section describing how to report security, ethics, or compliance concerns.

title: 9.6.0 - Safer user profile handling
summary: Jetstream now falls back gracefully instead of showing a confusing error when your user profile fails to load.

highlights.title: Safer profile fetch
highlights.description: If loading your user profile fails, Jetstream now falls back to a default instead of surfacing a confusing error.

title: 9.5.0 - Better Salesforce formula evaluation, desktop persistence fixes
summary: Formula evaluation now covers far more of the Salesforce formula language with fewer bugs, plus desktop persistence fixes for VDI environments.

highlights.title: Better formula evaluation
highlights.description: Formula evaluation now supports far more of the Salesforce formula language with fewer bugs.

highlights.title: Desktop persistence reliability
highlights.description: Fewer unexpected logouts and no more wiped org lists on Windows VDI setups.

title: 9.4.1 - Desktop org list and Salesforce API fixes
summary: Fix for orgs and org groups not appearing on first launch of the desktop app, plus cleaner handling of empty-body requests in the Salesforce API tool.

highlights.title: Orgs visible on desktop first launch
highlights.description: Orgs and org groups now appear immediately on first load of the desktop app instead of requiring a manual refresh.

highlights.title: Salesforce API request with empty body
highlights.description: Sending a Salesforce API request with an empty body no longer crashes the request editor.

title: 9.4.0 - Google Drive picker on desktop and extension
summary: Pick files and folders from Google Drive inside the desktop app and browser extension, plus a fix for SFDX change tracking after creating fields with permissions.

highlights.title: Google Drive picker on desktop and extension
highlights.description: Select files and folders from Google Drive when downloading or loading data, now available from the desktop app and browser extension.

highlights.title: SFDX change tracking for new fields with permissions
highlights.description: Creating fields with profiles or permission sets selected now updates those records so the SFDX CLI detects the change.

highlights.title: Keyboard navigation on the feedback widget
highlights.description: The feedback widget context menu supports arrow keys, Home/End, Escape, and Shift+F10 without needing a mouse.

highlights.title: Permissions Manager filter input shortcuts
highlights.description: Cmd/Ctrl+A, Home, End, and arrow keys in the header filter input now edit the text instead of navigating the grid.

title: 9.3.0 - Terms of Service acceptance and per-user desktop encryption
summary: New Terms of Service acceptance flow during sign-up and sign-in, plus a fix for desktop users on virtual machines whose saved org credentials were becoming unreadable.

highlights.title: Terms of Service acceptance
highlights.description: Users are prompted to accept the current Terms of Service during registration and login, with acceptance tracked per account.

highlights.title: Saved orgs no longer lost on virtual desktops
highlights.description: Saved org credentials in the desktop app no longer become unreadable on virtual desktops that reprovision daily.

highlights.title: Google SSO setup docs
highlights.description: Added images and clearer help text for configuring the OIDC issuer URL when setting up Google SSO.

title: 9.2.0 - Landing page refresh
summary: Refreshed the getjetstream.app marketing landing page. No changes inside the app itself.

highlights.title: Landing page refresh
highlights.description: The getjetstream.app marketing site has been updated with new content and visuals.

title: 9.1.0 - Paste sanitization and bulk-update errors
summary: Editors now strip invisible characters from pasted text, and bulk update failures surface the real server error instead of a generic message.

highlights.title: Sanitize pasted text in editors
highlights.description: Invisible characters from copied content are removed on paste so Salesforce won't reject the value.

highlights.title: Real error messages on bulk update failures
highlights.description: When updating records without a file, the actual server error is shown instead of a generic one.

highlights.title: Editor line-number reset
highlights.description: Anonymous Apex and the metadata compare modal no longer jump to an odd scroll position when the editor re-renders.

highlights.title: Error handling in bulk API loads
highlights.description: Errors during bulk API loads are now shown instead of the job silently stopping.

title: 9.0.1 - Maintenance
summary: Behind-the-scenes maintenance and security updates. No changes to how the app works.

highlights.title: Maintenance and security updates
highlights.description: Routine behind-the-scenes updates. No changes to how the app works.

title: 9.0.0 - SAML and OIDC single sign-on for teams
summary: Teams can now configure SAML and OIDC single sign-on with domain-based login discovery, plus audit logging on all team record changes.

highlights.title: SAML and OIDC SSO for teams
highlights.description: Team owners can configure SAML or OIDC providers (Okta, Azure, Google, generic), verify domains, and route members to SSO at login.

highlights.title: Domain discovery at login
highlights.description: Enter your email and Jetstream routes you to the right SSO provider based on verified domains without extra clicks.

highlights.title: Team audit log
highlights.description: All team-related record changes now write audit entries you can review from the team dashboard.

highlights.title: Authenticator code grace period
highlights.description: Two-factor authenticator codes now get a 30 second grace window, so a code that rotates right as you submit it no longer fails.

highlights.title: Improved SSO login form
highlights.description: You can submit the login form right away instead of waiting for the bot-check challenge to finish, which works better with password managers and autofill.

title: 8.25.0 - Quick record view in the browser extension
summary: The browser extension gains a quick record view that opens in the same Salesforce tab, plus faster URL detection and login state fixes.

highlights.title: Quick record view in-place
highlights.description: View a Salesforce record inside the current tab from the browser extension without opening a new one.

highlights.title: Faster URL detection for current-record actions
highlights.description: The view/edit current record button now updates almost immediately as you navigate, so it stays accurate for the record you are on.

highlights.title: Extension login state fixes
highlights.description: The extension now reacts correctly to login and logout events, so you no longer see stale information after signing in.

title: 8.24.0 - Metadata audit signals and Google folder memory
summary: Custom metadata records now show a last-modified date, invalid metadata timestamps are flagged with a warning, and Jetstream remembers your recent Google Drive folder.

highlights.title: Last modified on custom metadata records
highlights.description: Custom metadata records now show a last-modified date, since Salesforce does not provide the usual audit fields for them.

highlights.title: Warning for invalid metadata timestamps
highlights.description: When Salesforce returns an invalid audit timestamp, a warning icon now tells you the correct data is not available instead of showing a misleading date.

highlights.title: Remembered Google folder selection
highlights.description: When exporting or uploading to Google Drive, your recent folder choice is remembered so repeat uploads take fewer clicks.

highlights.title: Automation Control works in namespaced orgs
highlights.description: Orgs that have their own namespace can now manage components inside their managed package from Automation Control.

title: 8.23.1 - Google export fix for Permissions Manager
summary: Exporting from Permissions Manager to Google Drive now correctly produces an Xlsx file instead of falling back to a local CSV download.

highlights.title: Permissions Manager Google export fix
highlights.description: Exports to Google Drive now produce an Xlsx file instead of falling back to a local CSV download.

title: 8.23.0 - Friendlier record creation and keyboard fixes
summary: Owner and audit fields are now optional when creating records, with an option to save even when the form reports errors. Keyboard navigation in lookup pickers is fixed.

highlights.title: Audit fields treated as optional on create
highlights.description: Owner and audit fields are no longer blocking on record creation, so Salesforce automation can populate them without your form complaining.

highlights.title: Save anyway option
highlights.description: If the form shows validation errors that may be cleared by Salesforce automation, you can now save the record anyway.

highlights.title: Keyboard navigation in lookup combobox
highlights.description: Tab events are no longer swallowed, so you can move through record lookup and form group dropdowns with the keyboard again.

title: 8.22.0 - Auto-select org on group change
summary: Switching org groups now auto-selects the most recently used org in that group, or the first org if none have been used.

highlights.title: Auto-select org when changing groups
highlights.description: Changing the active org group now picks the most recently used org from that group, or the first org in the list.

title: 8.21.0 - Higher load and download limits
summary: Higher limits for data loads and attachment downloads, a movable feedback widget, and a fix that keeps permission manager filter text across tab changes.

highlights.title: Higher data load batch limits
highlights.description: Paid users can now run more batches in a single data load, with a higher ceiling than free users.

highlights.title: Larger attachment downloads
highlights.description: Paid web users can download up to 2000 attachments at a time, free users up to 250, and the total size limit was raised from 500MB to 1GB.

highlights.title: No download limits on desktop and extension
highlights.description: Desktop and browser extension users have no imposed attachment download limits since the work happens locally.

highlights.title: Movable feedback widget
highlights.description: The feedback widget can now be moved or hidden so it does not cover content, and the query builder SOQL editor has extra scroll space underneath.

highlights.title: Permission manager filter persistence
highlights.description: The filter text you type in the permission manager is now retained when you switch tabs.

title: 8.20.0 - Permission export improvements
summary: Permission manager exports are more reliable, show real errors on failure, and now offer CSV as a fallback format.

highlights.title: More reliable permission exports
highlights.description: Reduced export failures when downloading large permission sets.

highlights.title: CSV fallback for permission exports
highlights.description: Added CSV as an export option so you can fall back when XLSX generation fails on very large exports.

highlights.title: Real error messages on export failure
highlights.description: Export failures now surface an error to the user instead of silently doing nothing.

title: 8.19.2 - Maintenance and security updates
summary: Behind-the-scenes maintenance and security updates. No changes to how the app works.

highlights.title: Maintenance and security updates
highlights.description: Routine behind-the-scenes updates. No changes to how the app works.

title: 8.19.1 - Field permission correctness fix
summary: Fix for field permission records that could save with incorrect values when permissions came from alternative sources.

highlights.title: Field permission values fix
highlights.description: Field permissions now save with the correct values when the permission comes from an alternative source.

title: 8.19.0 - Maintenance and security updates
summary: Behind-the-scenes maintenance and security updates. No changes to how the app works.

highlights.title: Maintenance and security updates
highlights.description: Routine behind-the-scenes updates. No changes to how the app works.

title: 8.18.1 - Improve email deliverability
summary: Removes the hidden email preview header that was tripping up some corporate email filters.

highlights.title: Better email deliverability
highlights.description: Removed the invisible preview text in transactional emails so corporate spam filters stop flagging them.

title: 8.18.0 - Zip preview for data loads, attachment error handling
summary: Data loads with attachments now preview the zip file and warn about mismatched filenames before the job runs.

highlights.title: Zip preview on data loads with attachments
highlights.description: When you attach a zip file to a load, Jetstream now previews its contents, warns about invalid filenames, and flags files that do not match any row in the data file.

highlights.title: Missing attachments marked as row errors
highlights.description: If a referenced binary file is not found in the zip, that record is now flagged as an error instead of silently succeeding with no attachment.

highlights.title: Team management docs
highlights.description: The team management page is now linked from the docs sidebar.

title: 8.17.1 - Manage Permissions handles invalid FieldPermission records
summary: Fixes a Manage Permissions failure caused by invalid FieldPermission records that Salesforce had started returning.

highlights.title: Manage Permissions no longer fails on invalid records
highlights.description: Salesforce had started returning FieldPermission rows with invalid IDs; Manage Permissions now skips them instead of erroring out.

title: 8.17.0 - Desktop menu upgrades, large XLSX handling
summary: The desktop app picks up recent-files and settings menu entries, and large XLSX uploads no longer hit "Invalid Array Length" errors.

highlights.title: Recent files in the desktop menu
highlights.description: The desktop app now lists recently opened files and log files in the menu bar.

highlights.title: Open settings from the desktop menu
highlights.description: Settings are now reachable from a dedicated menu entry instead of only from the in-app nav.

highlights.title: Large XLSX files load reliably
highlights.description: Large spreadsheets that previously failed with "Invalid Array Length" errors now load reliably.

highlights.title: Desktop bulk query downloads fixed
highlights.description: Bulk API query downloads now save to disk correctly on the desktop app.

highlights.title: Desktop org links open in-app
highlights.description: "Open in Salesforce" links now stay inside the desktop app instead of bouncing to the browser.

title: 8.16.0 - Team dashboard in desktop, org delete shortcut
summary: Team admins can now open the team dashboard from the desktop app, and orgs with connection errors get a quick delete shortcut.

highlights.title: Team dashboard in the desktop app
highlights.description: If your account has team access, a new menu link opens the team dashboard from the desktop app.

highlights.title: Delete button on errored org cards
highlights.description: Orgs with connection errors now show a delete button directly on the card for faster cleanup.

highlights.title: Salesforce connection errors surfaced on desktop
highlights.description: The desktop app now shows an error toast when a Salesforce connection fails.

highlights.title: Consistent static field dropdown on loads
highlights.description: The static-value dropdown in field mapping now matches the styling used everywhere else.

title: 8.15.1 - Hard delete in load records
summary: Load records now supports hard delete, plus fixes for the picklist space key and the data table lookup editor.

highlights.title: Hard delete for load records
highlights.description: Added a hard delete option to the data loader and query results page alongside the existing delete operation.

highlights.title: Picklist space key fix
highlights.description: Pressing space in a picklist menu no longer scrolls the page.

highlights.title: Data table lookup editor fix
highlights.description: The inline lookup editor in query results no longer closes on the first keypress in manual mode, and remembers your last input mode.

title: 8.15.0 - Configurable SOQL format options
summary: Choose how Jetstream formats generated SOQL to match your preferences, plus a desktop asset fix for the code editor.

highlights.title: SOQL format options
highlights.description: Configure how generated SOQL is formatted, including casing and layout preferences.

highlights.title: Desktop editor assets fixed
highlights.description: Fixed missing code editor assets in the desktop build.

title: 8.14.0 - Record lookup in query filters
summary: Query filter values now support a record lookup so you can search for the record you want to filter on instead of hunting for an ID.

highlights.title: Record lookup in query filters
highlights.description: When building a query filter on a reference field, search for the related record and have the ID inserted into your SOQL.

highlights.title: Lookup clear button fix
highlights.description: The clear button now works correctly when the lookup editor is in manual text entry mode.

title: 8.13.1 - Lookup filter styling fix
summary: Follow-up fix to styling on the new record lookup filter.

highlights.title: Lookup filter styles
highlights.description: Corrected visual styling on the record lookup filter introduced in 8.13.0.

title: 8.13.0 - Lookup picker for reference fields
summary: Editing reference fields now offers a lookup search instead of pasting raw IDs, with polymorphic object selection built in.

highlights.title: Record lookup for reference fields
highlights.description: Search for related records when editing lookup fields, including choosing the target object for polymorphic references.

highlights.title: Accessibility fixes
highlights.description: Resolved several accessibility issues across the app.

title: 8.12.1 - Feedback attachment fix
summary: Patch release that fixes multiple file attachments in the new in-app feedback widget.

highlights.title: Multiple feedback attachments
highlights.description: The feedback form now supports up to 5 attachments, warns when you exceed the limit, and correctly delivers every attachment in the resulting email.

title: 8.12.0 - In-app feedback
summary: Send feedback and bug reports directly from inside Jetstream, with support for file attachments on web, desktop, and the browser extension.

highlights.title: In-app feedback
highlights.description: A new feedback widget lets you send questions, bug reports, and suggestions directly from the app instead of filing a GitHub issue.

highlights.title: Feedback from every form factor
highlights.description: The feedback flow works on web, desktop, and the browser extension, with attachment support on every platform.

highlights.title: Reliable extension attachments
highlights.description: File attachments now upload reliably in the browser extension.

title: 8.11.0 - Bug bash fixes and API version bump
summary: A batch of bug fixes, XML comment support in package manifests, clearer deployment terminology, and a newer default Salesforce API version.

highlights.title: Package.xml comment support
highlights.description: Comments inside an XML package manifest no longer break parsing during deploy and retrieve operations.

highlights.title: Editing orgs on the deployment page
highlights.description: Fixed a bug where editing an org from the deployment page would break navigation to the next step.

highlights.title: Unmanaged terminology
highlights.description: References to "non-managed" tests and fields were updated to "unmanaged" across the UI and docs for consistency with Salesforce.

highlights.title: Production test level warning
highlights.description: The deployment options screen now shows an inline error when an invalid test level is picked for a production org.

highlights.title: Salesforce API 65.0
highlights.description: New org connections now use Salesforce API version 65.0.

title: 8.10.0 - Session error detection
summary: Better detection of invalid org sessions so connection errors are surfaced promptly and you are prompted to reconnect.

highlights.title: Invalid session detection
highlights.description: Additional Salesforce error responses now mark the org as having a connection error, so you are prompted to reconnect instead of hitting opaque failures.

title: 8.9.1 - Fix metadata download regression
summary: Patch release that restores metadata downloads after a recent regression.

highlights.title: Metadata downloads work again
highlights.description: Fixed an issue where metadata downloads could fail.

title: 8.9.0 - Auth hardening and edit modal improvements
summary: Major authentication hardening including password history and account lockout, plus View All records access in the edit/create/clone record modal.

highlights.title: Auth hardening
highlights.description: Password history prevents reuse of the last 10 passwords, account lockout protects against repeated reset attempts, and login flows no longer leak whether an email is registered.

highlights.title: Improved password reset flow
highlights.description: Changed passwords are tracked in history, the strength indicator shows on reset, reuse errors stay visible, and the login form auto-fills the reset email.

highlights.title: View All Records on edit modal
highlights.description: The edit, create, and clone record modal now loads every field instead of only layout-assigned fields.

highlights.title: Team role safety
highlights.description: Billing-only users can no longer promote others to admin or modify administrator accounts.

highlights.title: Smarter org expiration emails
highlights.description: The 90-day inactive-org reminder now skips users who do not actively use Jetstream, and test-mode summaries are accurate.

title: 8.8.0 - Org expiration, Organization Groups, bulk org delete
summary: Unused Salesforce orgs now expire with advance email notice, the Organization page handles refresh/reconnect cleanly, and you can delete orgs in bulk.

highlights.title: Org expiration with email notice
highlights.description: Salesforce orgs unused for 90 days are flagged for expiration, with email notifications summarizing expiring and expired orgs.

highlights.title: Easier reconnect for expired orgs
highlights.description: The Organization page surfaces expiring and expired orgs, and reconnect pre-fills your existing connection details.

highlights.title: Bulk delete Salesforce orgs
highlights.description: Select and delete multiple connected orgs at once from the Organizations page.

highlights.title: Rename to "Organization Group"
highlights.description: What used to be called "Jetstream Organization" is now "Organization Group" everywhere in the app, to avoid confusion with a Salesforce organization.

highlights.title: Download format is remembered
highlights.description: Your last-used download format (CSV, Excel, JSON, etc.) is remembered per-user as the new default.

title: 8.7.0 - Table filter fixes and connected-app onboarding help
summary: Table filters now stay in sync when data reloads, password reset accepts plus-sign emails, and orgs missing the Jetstream connected app get clearer install guidance.

highlights.title: Table filters follow data updates
highlights.description: When table data reloads, existing filters are retained and their available values update so the filter still matches the new records.

highlights.title: Numeric column filters fixed
highlights.description: Filters on numeric fields now behave correctly and no longer drop values on refresh.

highlights.title: Password reset with plus-sign emails
highlights.description: Emails containing a "+" no longer get mangled into a space during password reset.

highlights.title: Connected app install guidance
highlights.description: Help links point users to the page where they would install the Jetstream connected app if it is missing, plus a sandbox sync callout.

highlights.title: Cookie banner padding fix
highlights.description: The consent banner no longer throws off in-app alignment while still looking right on the landing page.

title: 8.6.0 - Opt-in analytics with cookie consent
summary: Analytics are now opt-in via a cookie consent banner for GDPR compliance.

highlights.title: Cookie consent banner
highlights.description: Analytics cookies are now opt-in with an in-app consent banner, aligned with GDPR expectations.

title: 8.5.0 - Rebuilt binary attachment downloads
summary: Binary attachment downloads are rebuilt to be more reliable, with desktop-native progress and automatic field re-querying so you do not have to think about which fields to include.

highlights.title: More reliable attachment downloads
highlights.description: Attachment downloads are more reliable and no longer require a page refresh to work.

highlights.title: Desktop background job with live progress
highlights.description: On desktop, attachment downloads run in the background and save directly to disk with progress notifications.

highlights.title: StaticResource download support
highlights.description: StaticResource is now a supported export type alongside Attachment, ContentVersion, and Document.

highlights.title: No more required-field guesswork
highlights.description: Jetstream re-queries records for the fields it needs, so you can pick any query and still export binary files cleanly.

title: 8.4.0 - View Record checkbox fix, smoother desktop auto-update
summary: Fixes checkboxes rendering blank in View Record, improves the desktop auto-update UX, and lets you pick filename formats for zip attachment exports.

highlights.title: Checkbox fields render correctly in View Record
highlights.description: Read-only checkbox fields no longer appear blank when viewing a record.

highlights.title: Quieter desktop auto-updates
highlights.description: Update status lives in a navbar popover instead of an intrusive dialog that could pop up multiple times.

highlights.title: Duplicate filenames in zip exports
highlights.description: When downloading binary attachments, you can now choose the filename format to use instead of hitting duplicate-name collisions.

highlights.title: No stray navbar icons without an org
highlights.description: Record and user search popovers are hidden until a valid org is selected, avoiding confusing empty states.

highlights.title: Desktop login works for team accounts
highlights.description: Desktop login now works for team accounts and blocks users who are no longer active in a team.

title: 8.3.0 - Better related-object loading and assorted bug fixes
summary: Load Records now shows every related object on polymorphic lookups and fetches related-field metadata on demand. Also fixes Firefox drag in the query builder and a create-organization regression.

highlights.title: All related objects on polymorphic lookups
highlights.description: Field mapping on Load Records now shows every related object for polymorphic relationships instead of capping the list at five.

highlights.title: On-demand related-field metadata
highlights.description: Related-object fields are now fetched only when the object is selected in mapping, with a manual retry when a fetch fails.

highlights.title: Firefox query builder drag
highlights.description: Condition rows in the query builder can be dragged on Firefox again.

highlights.title: Create organization from selected org
highlights.description: Creating a new organization no longer fails when another organization is selected.

title: 8.2.0 - Bug bash fixes across load, deploy, and automation control
summary: Collection of fixes from a bug bash, including deploy-metadata token refresh, a safer default for rollbackOnError in production, and a fix for Automation Control select-all on filtered rows.

highlights.title: Safer default for production deploys
highlights.description: The rollbackOnError option in custom-metadata loads now defaults to true in production orgs, with clearer help text when left off.

highlights.title: Deploy Metadata token refresh
highlights.description: Deploying metadata between orgs now checks each org's session before starting, avoiding a cryptic token-refresh failure mid-deploy.

highlights.title: Automation Control select-all respects filters
highlights.description: Enabling or disabling automations from the header checkbox now only affects the rows currently visible in the table.

highlights.title: Create new record from query results
highlights.description: Creating a new record from the query results page works again.

highlights.title: Change debug log levels
highlights.description: Changing debug log levels works again.

title: 8.1.0 - Login configuration and email verification fixes
summary: Fixes login configuration lookup for individual users and repairs the email-link verification flow used during 2FA.

highlights.title: Correct login configuration lookup
highlights.description: Individual accounts no longer incorrectly inherit team login rules.

highlights.title: Verify email via link works again
highlights.description: Restores the 2FA email-verification link flow, which was rejecting valid codes.

title: 8.0.1 - Fix crash on load
summary: Hotfix for a crash on load that affected some users after the 8.0.0 upgrade.

highlights.title: Fix crash on load
highlights.description: Fixed a crash on load that affected some accounts after the 8.0.0 upgrade.

title: 8.0.0 - Team plan
summary: Introduces the new Jetstream Team plan with a team dashboard, member management, login configuration, and auth activity.

highlights.title: Team plan and team dashboard
highlights.description: Invite teammates, manage members and roles, configure login rules, and review session and authentication activity from a single dashboard.

highlights.title: Unified billing experience
highlights.description: Reworked billing page with clearer plan cards, monthly/annual toggle, and team naming during upgrade.

highlights.title: Desktop update fixes
highlights.description: Fixed Windows auto-update failures seen on the previous release.

title: 7.10.0 - Desktop history sync and binary upload fixes
summary: Fixes binary uploads on the desktop app and documents the upcoming outbound IP address ranges.

highlights.title: Desktop history sync fix
highlights.description: Fixed an issue where history sync could fail to connect on the desktop app.

highlights.title: Binary file uploads on desktop
highlights.description: Binary attachment uploads from the desktop app now work correctly.

highlights.title: Outbound IP address ranges
highlights.description: The getting started docs now include a dedicated page describing the upcoming API outbound IP address ranges.

title: 7.9.1 - Permission manager column fix and desktop download link
summary: Fixes the View All Records column width in Manage Permissions and corrects the x64 desktop download link.

highlights.title: View All Records column width
highlights.description: The View All Records column in the permission manager grid now renders with the correct width.

highlights.title: Correct x64 desktop download link
highlights.description: The desktop download page now points at the right x64 installer asset.

title: 7.9.0 - View All Fields in Manage Permissions
summary: Adds support for the new View All Fields object permission in Manage Permissions and fixes a save bug affecting View All Records.

highlights.title: View All Fields object permission
highlights.description: Grant or revoke the new Salesforce View All Fields permission alongside the other object permissions in Manage Permissions.

highlights.title: Fix View All Records save value
highlights.description: Saving permissions now persists the value you selected for View All Records and View All.

title: 7.8.0 - Better large-file uploads and higher free-plan limit
summary: Improves binary file uploads so large files upload reliably, and raises the free-plan attachment filesize limit.

highlights.title: Reliable large attachment uploads
highlights.description: Binary attachment loads now handle large files reliably, so big files upload without timeouts.

highlights.title: Higher free-plan attachment limit
highlights.description: The attachment filesize cap on the free plan was raised.

highlights.title: Platform events publishing fix
highlights.description: Fixed an issue that could occur when publishing platform events.

title: 7.7.2 - Billing portal fix
summary: Fixes the billing portal, which was failing to open after a recent security change.

highlights.title: Billing portal fix
highlights.description: Fixed an issue where the billing portal failed to open after a recent security change.

title: 7.7.1 - Salesforce login URL fix
summary: Fixes invalid URLs generated when logging in to Salesforce from Jetstream links.

highlights.title: Login with Salesforce URL fix
highlights.description: Links that log you into Salesforce now generate valid URLs, avoiding double-slash and other malformed links.

title: 7.7.0 - Field mapping and UI polish
summary: Cleans up the field mapping dropdown and fixes several small UI issues.

highlights.title: Cleaner field mapping dropdown
highlights.description: The load records field mapping dropdown now shows the field type as tertiary text, matching the rest of the app.

highlights.title: Combobox sizing fix
highlights.description: The combobox no longer miscalculates its size in certain layouts.

highlights.title: Better Salesforce domain detection in the extension
highlights.description: The Chrome extension now detects Salesforce domains more reliably.

highlights.title: Error popover styling
highlights.description: The error popover nubbin color now matches the popover background.

title: 7.6.3 - Binary file load fixes
summary: Fixes a file picker conflict on the binary attachment loader.

highlights.title: Binary attachment file picker fix
highlights.description: Clicking the "Zip with attachments" input no longer accidentally triggers the main CSV file input.

title: 7.6.2 - Bigger attachment uploads and desktop download fix
summary: Raises the binary attachment upload limit, fixes attachment downloads in the desktop app, and ships a matching web extension release.

highlights.title: Larger binary attachment uploads
highlights.description: Paid users can upload up to 1 GB of attachments, and the desktop app and browser extension have no upload limit.

highlights.title: Attachment downloads fixed on desktop
highlights.description: Zip downloads of query result attachments now work in the desktop app.

title: 7.6.1 - Desktop download link fix
summary: Fixes the Windows desktop download link in the connected app docs.

highlights.title: Desktop download link fix in docs
highlights.description: The Windows desktop download link in the connected app docs now points at the correct location.

title: 7.6.0 - Record modal anywhere, changeset options, Google Sheet refresh
summary: View, edit, and clone any record from anywhere in the app, refresh Google Sheet data on the load page, and control rollback behavior when adding metadata to a changeset.

highlights.title: View/Edit/Clone record modal, app-wide
highlights.description: Viewing or editing a record now works consistently from any screen and updates your recent records list automatically.

highlights.title: Refresh Google Sheet data on Load Records
highlights.description: Re-pull data from your selected Google Sheet even after navigating forward and backward through the load steps.

highlights.title: Changeset upload options
highlights.description: When adding metadata to an outbound changeset, you can now adjust deploy options and Jetstream defaults to "rollback on failure" for production orgs.

highlights.title: Date picker closes on outside click
highlights.description: The date picker now dismisses correctly when you click outside of it in most contexts.

highlights.title: Recent records stays in sync
highlights.description: Opening a record from anywhere in the app now updates the recent records list, so it is easier to jump back to what you were just working on.

title: 7.5.0 - Accurate record count preview for queries
summary: The record count preview shown before running a query no longer fails when the query includes an ORDER BY clause.

highlights.title: Query record count preview works with ORDER BY
highlights.description: The count preview now strips the incompatible ORDER BY before running, so you get an accurate record total every time.

title: 7.4.0 - Stronger encryption for stored org credentials
summary: Each stored Salesforce org is now encrypted with its own unique key.

highlights.title: Per-org encryption keys
highlights.description: Each stored Salesforce org now uses its own unique encryption key instead of a single shared key.

title: 7.3.5 - Diff editor collapses unchanged regions after swap
summary: Fixes the view/compare metadata diff editor so collapsed unchanged regions stay collapsed after swapping the two sides.

highlights.title: Diff editor swap fix
highlights.description: Swapping sides in the view/compare metadata diff now keeps unchanged regions collapsed as expected.

title: 7.3.4 - One-click field change in query filters
summary: Removes the extra clear step when changing the field in a query filter condition.

highlights.title: Faster field swap in query filters
highlights.description: The "x" button on a selected filter field is gone, so you can pick a different field in one click instead of two.

title: 7.3.3 - Connected app guidance and annual pricing fix
summary: Adds an in-app banner about upcoming Salesforce Connected App changes, updates the related docs, and fixes annual pricing display for existing subscribers.

highlights.title: Upcoming Salesforce Connected App notice
highlights.description: The home screen now shows a banner linking to guidance for preparing for Salesforce's upcoming Connected App changes.

highlights.title: Annual subscription pricing fix
highlights.description: Existing annual subscribers now see the correct price on the billing page.

highlights.title: Docs refresh
highlights.description: Overview, security, and troubleshooting docs have been updated with current Connected App install steps.

title: 7.3.2 - Fix view-results modal for bulk edits from query
summary: Fixes a bug where viewing bulk results after bulk editing records from query results did nothing.

highlights.title: View bulk results works again
highlights.description: Bulk editing from query results and then clicking "view results" now opens the results modal instead of silently doing nothing.

title: 7.3.1 - Maintenance and security updates
summary: Behind-the-scenes maintenance and security updates. No changes to how the app works.

highlights.title: Maintenance and security updates
highlights.description: Routine behind-the-scenes updates. No changes to how the app works.

title: 7.3.0 - Windows desktop app and in-app desktop/extension promotion
summary: The desktop app now installs and auto-updates on Windows (code-signed), and the web app surfaces links to the desktop and browser extension builds from the home screen.

highlights.title: Windows desktop app
highlights.description: Desktop 1.1.0 ships a signed Windows installer with proper install, update, and Start Menu shortcut handling.

highlights.title: Alternative app formats on the home screen
highlights.description: The home screen now shows a card pointing entitled users to the desktop app and browser extension.

highlights.title: Desktop entitlement fix
highlights.description: Desktop was missing from entitlement checks, so paid users could be blocked from the desktop build. This is corrected.

title: 7.2.0 - Copy load results to clipboard
summary: You can now copy load results directly to the clipboard as Excel, CSV, or JSON without downloading a file first.

highlights.title: Copy load results to clipboard
highlights.description: From the load results modal, copy all or selected rows to the clipboard in spreadsheet, CSV, or JSON format.

title: 7.1.0 - Diff editor toggle, folder metadata fixes
summary: Compare metadata got an option to hide unchanged lines, folder metadata types are now retrieved correctly, and several datatable and popover bugs are fixed.

highlights.title: Toggle unchanged lines in the metadata diff editor
highlights.description: When comparing metadata between orgs you can now collapse unchanged lines, which makes larger files much easier to scan.

highlights.title: Folder metadata types work correctly
highlights.description: Document, Email, Report, and Dashboard folders now appear in the metadata picker and retrieve the correct metadata from Salesforce.

highlights.title: Datatable tab navigation fix
highlights.description: Fixed an edge case where Tab navigation inside the datatable could skip the action and Id columns in production builds.

title: 7.0.0 - Better datatable keyboard navigation and keyboard-focus tooltips
summary: Meaningful wins for keyboard users in the datatable, keyboard-focus tooltips, and several dropdown and popover fixes.

highlights.title: Improved datatable keyboard navigation
highlights.description: Tab now cycles through action and record Id cells, Enter opens the record popover, and inline editing matches SLDS styles.

highlights.title: Tooltips respond to keyboard focus
highlights.description: Focusing a button or icon with the keyboard now shows its tooltip, matching the behavior you get with a mouse hover.

highlights.title: Bulk update from query results fixed
highlights.description: The bulk update job from query results no longer fails, so jobs complete and surface their status correctly.

highlights.title: Dropdowns close reliably on outside click
highlights.description: Clicking outside a dropdown now closes it in the cases where it was previously staying open.

highlights.title: Fewer popover and tooltip glitches
highlights.description: Fixed several positioning glitches in popovers and tooltips across modals.
